last_standing.name: Conquest
last_standing.notes: Only one alliance retains any settlements or units.

endgame_project.name: Space Race
endgame_project.notes: Complete and launch all spaceship parts (Apollo Program required).

diplomatic.name: Diplomatic
diplomatic.notes: Win the World Leader election via the United Nations (secular; 60% of the weighted vote, candidate must hold Mass Media) or the Apostolic Palace (religious; 75% of the vote, every living civ must hold the palace's belief). A candidate cannot win if their own alliance casts 75% or more of the total vote weight.

score.name: Score
score.notes: The first alliance whose summed score reaches 400 wins immediately (distinct from Time, which compares scores only at the turn limit).

time.name: Time
time.notes: Highest score at the turn limit wins.
